CREATE TABLE test_table (col1 Int32, col2 Nullable(Int32), col3 String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, NULL, 'text'), (2, 3, ''), (NULL, NULL, 'example');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE defaultValueOfArgumentType(col2) IS NULL;
SELECT defaultValueOfArgumentType((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE col1 > 0));
SELECT defaultValueOfArgumentType((SELECT max(col1) FROM test_table GROUP BY col2));
SELECT defaultValueOfArgumentType(CAST(1 AS Int16)) + defaultValueOfArgumentType(CAST(NULL AS Nullable(Int32)));
SELECT defaultValueOfArgumentType(CAST((SELECT col1 FROM test_table WHERE col3 = 'text') AS Int32));
SELECT defaultValueOfArgumentType(CAST(COALESCE(col2, 0) AS Int32)) FROM test_table WHERE col1 = 2;
SELECT IF(defaultValueOfArgumentType(CAST(col2 AS Nullable(Int32))) IS NULL, 'Value is NULL', 'Value exists') AS result FROM test_table;
